title: Digital Government Policies Version 1.1
summary: Requires government to simplify and enhance public-sector data sharing practices and promote open data policy supporting reuse of government data for value creation.

theme_notes.data_privacy.data_governance_open_data: Sets cross-government digital policy requirements including data sharing and open data.
theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.cloud_dat: Digital government policy suite including cloud and shared digital services.

notes: Related instruments: Open Data Policy and Cloud First Policy
